    AI Overview
    This image features the logo for Health for California, an organization dedicated to helping California residents navigate insurance options. 
    • The company provides free assistance to individuals seeking health insurance coverage.
    • Services include helping users find and apply for plans through Covered California or private insurers.
    • They focus on providing personalized support for residents to understand their healthcare options.
